goal: plusZeroRightNeutral : (n : Nat) -> n + 0 = n
tactic_proof:
plusZeroRightNeutral Z = Refl
plusZeroRightNeutral (S k) = cong S (plusZeroRightNeutral k)

goal: plusSuccRightSucc : (left : Nat) -> (right : Nat) -> S (left + right) = left + S right
tactic_proof:
plusSuccRightSucc Z right = Refl
plusSuccRightSucc (S k) right = cong S (plusSuccRightSucc k right)

goal: plusCommutative : (left : Nat) -> (right : Nat) -> left + right = right + left
tactic_proof:
plusCommutative Z right = sym (plusZeroRightNeutral right)
plusCommutative (S k) right = rewrite plusCommutative k right in plusSuccRightSucc right k

goal: plusAssociative : (l, c, r : Nat) -> l + (c + r) = (l + c) + r
tactic_proof:
plusAssociative Z c r = Refl
plusAssociative (S k) c r = cong S (plusAssociative k c r)

goal: multZeroRightZero : (n : Nat) -> n * 0 = 0
tactic_proof:
multZeroRightZero Z = Refl
multZeroRightZero (S k) = multZeroRightZero k

goal: multOneRightNeutral : (n : Nat) -> n * 1 = n
tactic_proof:
multOneRightNeutral Z = Refl
multOneRightNeutral (S k) = cong S (multOneRightNeutral k)

goal: multRightSuccPlus : (left, right : Nat) -> left * S right = left + left * right
tactic_proof:
multRightSuccPlus Z right = Refl
multRightSuccPlus (S k) right = rewrite multRightSuccPlus k right in rewrite sym (plusAssociative right k (k * right)) in rewrite plusCommutative right k in rewrite plusAssociative k right (k * right) in Refl

goal: multCommutative : (left, right : Nat) -> left * right = right * left
tactic_proof:
multCommutative Z right = sym (multZeroRightZero right)
multCommutative (S k) right = rewrite multCommutative k right in sym (multRightSuccPlus right k)

goal: multDistributesOverPlusLeft : (l, c, r : Nat) -> (l + c) * r = l * r + c * r
tactic_proof:
multDistributesOverPlusLeft Z c r = Refl
multDistributesOverPlusLeft (S k) c r = rewrite multDistributesOverPlusLeft k c r in sym (plusAssociative r (k * r) (c * r))

goal: multAssociative : (l, c, r : Nat) -> l * (c * r) = (l * c) * r
tactic_proof:
multAssociative Z c r = Refl
multAssociative (S k) c r = rewrite multAssociative k c r in rewrite multDistributesOverPlusLeft c (k * c) r in Refl

goal: decEqNat : (n1, n2 : Nat) -> Dec (n1 = n2)
tactic_proof:
decEqNat Z Z = Yes Refl
decEqNat Z (S _) = No absurd
decEqNat (S _) Z = No absurd
decEqNat (S k) (S j) = case decEqNat k j of { Yes prf => Yes (cong S prf); No contra => No (\h => contra (injective h)) }

goal: isLTE : (m, n : Nat) -> Dec (LTE m n)
decEqBool : (b1, b2 : Bool) -> Dec (b1 = b2)
tactic_proof:
decEqBool True True = Yes Refl
decEqBool False False = Yes Refl
decEqBool True False = No absurd
decEqBool False True = No absurd

goal: notNotTrue : Not (Not a) -> a -> Void -> Void
tactic_proof: notNotTrue f x = f (\y => absurd (y x))

goal: decNot : Dec a -> Dec (Not a)
tactic_proof:
decNot (Yes prf) = No (\f => f prf)
decNot (No contra) = Yes contra

goal: vectAppendNilRightNeutral : (xs : Vect n a) -> xs ++ [] = xs
tactic_proof:
vectAppendNilRightNeutral [] = Refl
vectAppendNilRightNeutral (x :: xs) = cong (x ::) (vectAppendNilRightNeutral xs)

goal: vectMapId : (xs : Vect n a) -> map id xs = xs
tactic_proof:
vectMapId [] = Refl
vectMapId (x :: xs) = cong (x ::) (vectMapId xs)

goal: vectMapCompose : (f : b -> c) -> (g : a -> b) -> (xs : Vect n a) -> map f (map g xs) = map (f . g) xs
tactic_proof:
vectMapCompose f g [] = Refl
vectMapCompose f g (x :: xs) = cong (f (g x) ::) (vectMapCompose f g xs)

goal: vectLengthMap : (f : a -> b) -> (xs : Vect n a) -> length (map f xs) = length xs
tactic_proof:
vectLengthMap f [] = Refl
vectLengthMap f (x :: xs) = cong S (vectLengthMap f xs)

goal: vectReverseReverse : (xs : Vect n a) -> reverse (reverse xs) = xs
vectIndexMap : (f : a -> b) -> (xs : Vect n a) -> (i : Fin n) -> index i (map f xs) = f (index i xs)
tactic_proof:
vectIndexMap f (x :: xs) FZ = Refl
vectIndexMap f (x :: xs) (FS k) = vectIndexMap f xs k

goal: vectZipWithComm : (f : a -> a -> b) -> ((x, y : a) -> f x y = f y x) -> (xs, ys : Vect n a) -> zipWith f xs ys = zipWith f ys xs
tactic_proof:
vectZipWithComm f prf [] [] = Refl
vectZipWithComm f prf (x :: xs) (y :: ys) = rewrite prf x y in cong (f y x ::) (vectZipWithComm f prf xs ys)

goal: vectAppendLength : (xs : Vect m a) -> (ys : Vect n a) -> length (xs ++ ys) = m + n
tactic_proof:
vectAppendLength [] ys = Refl
vectAppendLength (x :: xs) ys = cong S (vectAppendLength xs ys)

goal: appendNilRightNeutral : (l : List a) -> l ++ [] = l
tactic_proof:
appendNilRightNeutral [] = Refl
appendNilRightNeutral (x :: xs) = cong (x ::) (appendNilRightNeutral xs)

goal: appendAssociative : (l, c, r : List a) -> l ++ (c ++ r) = (l ++ c) ++ r
tactic_proof:
appendAssociative [] c r = Refl
appendAssociative (x :: xs) c r = cong (x ::) (appendAssociative xs c r)

goal: mapAppend : (f : a -> b) -> (l1, l2 : List a) -> map f (l1 ++ l2) = map f l1 ++ map f l2
tactic_proof:
mapAppend f [] l2 = Refl
mapAppend f (x :: xs) l2 = cong (f x ::) (mapAppend f xs l2)

goal: lengthAppend : (l1, l2 : List a) -> length (l1 ++ l2) = length l1 + length l2
tactic_proof:
lengthAppend [] l2 = Refl
lengthAppend (x :: xs) l2 = cong S (lengthAppend xs l2)

goal: mapId : (l : List a) -> map id l = l
tactic_proof:
mapId [] = Refl
mapId (x :: xs) = cong (x ::) (mapId xs)

goal: mapCompose : (f : b -> c) -> (g : a -> b) -> (l : List a) -> map f (map g l) = map (f . g) l
tactic_proof:
mapCompose f g [] = Refl
mapCompose f g (x :: xs) = cong (f (g x) ::) (mapCompose f g xs)

goal: filterAppend : (p : a -> Bool) -> (l1, l2 : List a) -> filter p (l1 ++ l2) = filter p l1 ++ filter p l2
tactic_proof:
filterAppend p [] l2 = Refl
filterAppend p (x :: xs) l2 with (p x) | filterAppend p xs l2
  _ | True  | rec = cong (x ::) rec
  _ | False | rec = rec

goal: reverseAppend : (l1, l2 : List a) -> reverse (l1 ++ l2) = reverse l2 ++ reverse l1
finToNatBound : (i : Fin n) -> LT (finToNat i) n
tactic_proof:
finToNatBound FZ = LTESucc LTEZero
finToNatBound (FS k) = LTESucc (finToNatBound k)

goal: finToNatWeaken : (i : Fin n) -> finToNat (weaken i) = finToNat i
tactic_proof:
finToNatWeaken FZ = Refl
finToNatWeaken (FS k) = cong S (finToNatWeaken k)

goal: finToNatLast : {n : Nat} -> finToNat (last {n}) = n
tactic_proof:
finToNatLast {n = Z} = Refl
finToNatLast {n = S k} = cong S finToNatLast

goal: strengthenWeaken : (i : Fin n) -> strengthen (weaken i) = Just i
lastIsLargest : (i : Fin (S n)) -> LTE (finToNat i) n
linearSwap : (1 x : a) -> (1 y : b) -> (b, a)
tactic_proof: linearSwap x y = (y, x)

goal: linearDup : (1 x : a) -> {auto prf : Dup a} -> (a, a)
tactic_proof: linearDup x = dup x

goal: linearMap : (1 f : a -o b) -> (1 xs : LList a) -> LList b
tactic_proof:
linearMap f [] = []
linearMap f (x :: xs) = f x :: linearMap f xs

goal: useOnce : (1 r : Resource) -> IO ()
tactic_proof: useOnce r = release r

goal: linearFold : (1 f : b -o a -o b) -> (1 init : b) -> (1 xs : LList a) -> b
tactic_proof:
linearFold f init [] = init
linearFold f init (x :: xs) = linearFold f (f init x) xs

goal: dpairFst : DPair a p -> a
tactic_proof: dpairFst (x ** _) = x

goal: dpairSnd : (d : DPair a p) -> p (fst d)
tactic_proof: dpairSnd (_ ** prf) = prf

goal: filterDPair : (p : a -> Bool) -> List a -> List (DPair a (\x => So (p x)))
tactic_proof:
filterDPair p [] = []
filterDPair p (x :: xs) with (p x) proof eq
  _ | True = (x ** eqToSo eq) :: filterDPair p xs
  _ | False = filterDPair p xs

goal: lookupDPair : DecEq k => (key : k) -> List (k, v) -> Maybe (DPair v (\_ => Unit))
existsNat : (n : Nat ** LTE 5 n)
tactic_proof: existsNat = (5 ** reflexive)

goal: functorId : Functor f => (x : f a) -> map id x = x
functorCompose : Functor f => (g : b -> c) -> (h : a -> b) -> (x : f a) -> map g (map h x) = map (g . h) x
monadLeftId : Monad m => (a : t) -> (f : t -> m u) -> (pure a >>= f) = f a
monadRightId : Monad m => (ma : m a) -> (ma >>= pure) = ma
monadAssoc : Monad m => (ma : m a) -> (f : a -> m b) -> (g : b -> m c) -> ((ma >>= f) >>= g) = (ma >>= (\x => f x >>= g))
maybeMap : (f : a -> b) -> Maybe a -> Maybe b
tactic_proof:
maybeMap f Nothing = Nothing
maybeMap f (Just x) = Just (f x)

goal: maybeMapCompose : (f : b -> c) -> (g : a -> b) -> (mx : Maybe a) -> maybeMap f (maybeMap g mx) = maybeMap (f . g) mx
tactic_proof:
maybeMapCompose f g Nothing = Refl
maybeMapCompose f g (Just x) = Refl

goal: maybeBind : Maybe a -> (a -> Maybe b) -> Maybe b
tactic_proof:
maybeBind Nothing f = Nothing
maybeBind (Just x) f = f x

goal: maybeBindAssoc : (mx : Maybe a) -> (f : a -> Maybe b) -> (g : b -> Maybe c) -> maybeBind (maybeBind mx f) g = maybeBind mx (\x => maybeBind (f x) g)
tactic_proof:
maybeBindAssoc Nothing f g = Refl
maybeBindAssoc (Just x) f g = Refl

goal: isJustFromJust : (mx : Maybe a) -> isJust mx = True -> DPair a (\x => mx = Just x)
tactic_proof:
isJustFromJust (Just x) Refl = (x ** Refl)
isJustFromJust Nothing Refl impossible

goal: nothingAbsurd : the (Maybe a) Nothing = Just x -> Void
tactic_proof: nothingAbsurd Refl impossible

goal: maybeToList : Maybe a -> List a
tactic_proof:
maybeToList Nothing = []
maybeToList (Just x) = [x]

goal: fromMaybeDefault : (def : a) -> (mx : Maybe a) -> mx = Nothing -> fromMaybe def mx = def
tactic_proof:
fromMaybeDefault def Nothing Refl = Refl
fromMaybeDefault def (Just _) Refl impossible

goal: eitherMap : (f : a -> c) -> (g : b -> d) -> Either a b -> Either c d
tactic_proof:
eitherMap f g (Left x) = Left (f x)
eitherMap f g (Right y) = Right (g y)

goal: eitherMapCompose : (f1 : c -> e) -> (f2 : a -> c) -> (g1 : d -> f) -> (g2 : b -> d) -> (e : Either a b) -> eitherMap f1 g1 (eitherMap f2 g2 e) = eitherMap (f1 . f2) (g1 . g2) e
tactic_proof:
eitherMapCompose f1 f2 g1 g2 (Left x) = Refl
eitherMapCompose f1 f2 g1 g2 (Right y) = Refl

goal: eitherBimap : (f : a -> c) -> (g : b -> d) -> Either a b -> Either c d
tactic_proof:
eitherBimap f g (Left x) = Left (f x)
eitherBimap f g (Right y) = Right (g y)

goal: eitherSwap : Either a b -> Either b a
tactic_proof:
eitherSwap (Left x) = Right x
eitherSwap (Right y) = Left y

goal: eitherAssoc : Either (Either a b) c -> Either a (Either b c)
tactic_proof:
eitherAssoc (Left (Left x)) = Left x
eitherAssoc (Left (Right y)) = Right (Left y)
eitherAssoc (Right z) = Right (Right z)

goal: partitionEithers : List (Either a b) -> (List a, List b)
tactic_proof:
partitionEithers [] = ([], [])
partitionEithers (Left x :: xs) = let (ls, rs) = partitionEithers xs in (x :: ls, rs)
partitionEithers (Right y :: xs) = let (ls, rs) = partitionEithers xs in (ls, y :: rs)

goal: leftsAppend : (xs, ys : List (Either a b)) -> fst (partitionEithers (xs ++ ys)) = fst (partitionEithers xs) ++ fst (partitionEithers ys)
rightsAppend : (xs, ys : List (Either a b)) -> snd (partitionEithers (xs ++ ys)) = snd (partitionEithers xs) ++ snd (partitionEithers ys)
lteRefl : (n : Nat) -> LTE n n
tactic_proof:
lteRefl Z = LTEZero
lteRefl (S k) = LTESucc (lteRefl k)

goal: lteAntisym : LTE m n -> LTE n m -> m = n
tactic_proof:
lteAntisym LTEZero LTEZero = Refl
lteAntisym (LTESucc p) (LTESucc q) = cong S (lteAntisym p q)

goal: lteTrans : LTE l c -> LTE c r -> LTE l r
tactic_proof:
lteTrans LTEZero _ = LTEZero
lteTrans (LTESucc p) (LTESucc q) = LTESucc (lteTrans p q)

goal: lteSuccRight : LTE m n -> LTE m (S n)
tactic_proof:
lteSuccRight LTEZero = LTEZero
lteSuccRight (LTESucc p) = LTESucc (lteSuccRight p)

goal: lteAddRight : (m : Nat) -> (n : Nat) -> LTE m (m + n)
tactic_proof:
lteAddRight Z n = LTEZero
lteAddRight (S k) n = LTESucc (lteAddRight k n)

goal: notLteToGt : Not (LTE m n) -> LT n m
tactic_proof:
notLteToGt {m = Z} contra = absurd (contra LTEZero)
notLteToGt {m = S k} {n = Z} _ = LTESucc LTEZero
notLteToGt {m = S k} {n = S j} contra = LTESucc (notLteToGt (\p => contra (LTESucc p)))

goal: ltToLte : LT m n -> LTE m n
tactic_proof: ltToLte (LTESucc p) = lteSuccRight p

goal: maxComm : (m, n : Nat) -> max m n = max n m
takeLength : (n : Nat) -> (s : Stream a) -> length (take n s) = n
tactic_proof:
takeLength Z s = Refl
takeLength (S k) (x :: xs) = cong S (takeLength k xs)

goal: iterateHead : (f : a -> a) -> (x : a) -> head (iterate f x) = x
tactic_proof: iterateHead f x = Refl

goal: repeatHead : (x : a) -> head (repeat x) = x
tactic_proof: repeatHead x = Refl

goal: cycleNonEmpty : (xs : List a) -> NonEmpty xs -> Stream a
tactic_proof: cycleNonEmpty (x :: xs) IsNonEmpty = cycle (x :: xs)

goal: zipWithLength : (f : a -> b -> c) -> (n : Nat) -> (s1 : Stream a) -> (s2 : Stream b) -> length (take n (zipWith f s1 s2)) = n
tactic_proof:
zipWithLength f Z s1 s2 = Refl
zipWithLength f (S k) (x :: xs) (y :: ys) = cong S (zipWithLength f k xs ys)

goal: mapStream : (f : a -> b) -> (n : Nat) -> (s : Stream a) -> take n (map f s) = map f (take n s)
tactic_proof:
mapStream f Z s = Refl
mapStream f (S k) (x :: xs) = cong (f x ::) (mapStream f k xs)

goal: voidAbsurd : Void -> a
tactic_proof: voidAbsurd v = absurd v

goal: unitUnique : (x, y : ()) -> x = y
tactic_proof: unitUnique () () = Refl

goal: boolDec : (b : Bool) -> Dec (b = True)
tactic_proof:
boolDec True = Yes Refl
boolDec False = No absurd

goal: notNotBool : (b : Bool) -> not (not b) = b
tactic_proof:
notNotBool True = Refl
notNotBool False = Refl

goal: decElim : (a -> b) -> (Not a -> b) -> Dec a -> b
tactic_proof:
decElim f g (Yes prf) = f prf
decElim f g (No contra) = g contra

goal: eitherCommIso : Either a b -> Either b a
tactic_proof:
eitherCommIso (Left x) = Right x
eitherCommIso (Right y) = Left y

goal: lengthReplicate : (n : Nat) -> (x : a) -> length (replicate n x) = n
tactic_proof:
lengthReplicate Z x = Refl
lengthReplicate (S k) x = cong S (lengthReplicate k x)

goal: transposeInvolutive : (xss : Vect m (Vect n a)) -> transpose (transpose xss) = xss
diagonalZip : (xs : Vect n a) -> map (\i => index i xs) range = xs
tabulateIndex : (f : Fin n -> a) -> (i : Fin n) -> index i (tabulate f) = f i
tactic_proof:
tabulateIndex f FZ = Refl
tabulateIndex f (FS k) = tabulateIndex (f . FS) k

goal: generateLength : (n : Nat) -> (f : Fin n -> a) -> length (toList (tabulate f)) = n
concatMapLength : (f : a -> Vect m b) -> (xs : Vect n a) -> length (concat (map f xs)) = n * m
tactic_proof:
concatMapLength f [] = Refl
concatMapLength f (x :: xs) = rewrite concatMapLength f xs in vectAppendLength (f x) (concat (map f xs))

goal: intersperse : a -> Vect n a -> Vect (n + pred n) a
tactic_proof:
intersperse sep [] = []
intersperse sep [x] = [x]
intersperse sep (x :: y :: ys) = x :: sep :: intersperse sep (y :: ys)

goal: chunksOfLength : (k : Nat) -> {auto ok : NonZero k} -> (xs : Vect n a) -> length (chunksOf k xs) = divCeilNZ n k ok
